projects.name: Go OpenSource & Go Viral — Straw Hat Crew for Everyone
projects.description: VISION: Turn the Straw Hat agent crew into an open-source, self-managing OpenClaw template. Any user installs a crew and becomes their own Captain. Scale by replicating departments across machines. Build viral fanbase: OpenClaw x One Piece. Prerequisites: EPIC-004 complete, agent tree operational, MC polished. Ownership model: Projects=Nami, Epics=Jinbe, Stories=Usopp, Tasks=Each dept, Verification=Chopper.
